content.text:
The file is clear. Here are the results:

- **`construct_direct`** — direct struct-literal `BenchAuditEvent::CallReturned { .. }` (pattern #1)
- **`construct_via_builder`** — calls the builder helper `BenchAuditEvent::call_returned(...)` (pattern #2 call-site)
- **`construct_nested`** — wraps `BenchAuditEvent::CallReturned { .. }` inside `WrappedEvent::Inner(...)` (pattern #3)
- **`construct_imported`** — uses `use BenchAuditEvent::CallReturned; CallReturned { .. }` (pattern #4)

Excluded:
- `call_returned` — the builder helper's own implementation body (explicitly excluded by the task)
- `match_call_returned` — pure `match` arm, destructures only
- `if_let_call_returned` — `if let` destructuring only
- `type_only_distractor` — type mention in signature, no construction

```json
  "excluded": ["call_returned", "match_call_returned", "if_let_call_returned", "type_only_distractor"]
}
```
